hooks.command: CMD=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',d).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null || true); case "$CMD" in *grep*|*rg\ *|*ripgrep*|*find\ *|*fd\ *|*ack\ *|*ag\ *)   [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ] &&   echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"MANDATORY: graphify-out/graph.json exists. You MUST run `graphify query \"<question>\"` before grepping raw files. Only grep after graphify has oriented you, or to modify/debug specific lines."}}'   || true ;; esac
command -v rtk >/dev/null 2>&1 && rtk hook claude || true

CMD=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',d).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null || true); case "$CMD" in *"git checkout -b"*|*"git switch -c"*|*"git branch "[!-]*) COUNT=$(git branch -r 2>/dev/null | grep -v 'HEAD\|->\|main\|master' | grep -v '^ *$' | wc -l | tr -d ' '); [ "${COUNT:-0}" -gt 1 ] && echo "❌ ONE-BRANCH POLICY: ${COUNT} remote branches besides main exist. Merge+delete first. See core/git-policy.md" && exit 1 || true ;; esac

CMD=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); print(d.get('tool_input',d).get('command',''))" 2>/dev/null || true); case "$CMD" in *"npm install "[a-zA-Z@]*|*"yarn add "*|*"pnpm add "*|*"pip install "[a-zA-Z]*|*"uv add "*|*"npx"*|*"next build"*|*"next dev"*|*"tsc"*|*"pytest"*|*"cargo build"*|*"cargo run"*) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"📚 MANDATORY Context7 check: use built-in Claude connector (claude.ai/code) if available; fallback: mcp__Context7__resolve-library-id → mcp__Context7__query-docs. Before using any library API, verify current docs via Context7 — training data may be outdated. Breaking change example: @supabase/ssr v0.4 → 4 TypeScript errors. See lessons-learned/bugs/supabase-ssr-breaking-change.md"}}' ;; esac

HIT=$(python3 -c "import json,sys;d=json.load(sys.stdin);t=d.get('tool_input',d);s=(str(t.get('file_path') or '')+' '+str(t.get('pattern') or '')+' '+str(t.get('path') or '')).lower().replace(chr(92),'/');exts=('.py','.js','.ts','.tsx','.jsx','.go','.rs','.java','.rb','.c','.h','.cpp','.hpp','.cc','.cs','.kt','.swift','.php','.scala','.lua','.sh','.md','.rst','.txt','.mdx');sys.stdout.write('1' if 'graphify-out/' not in s and any(e in s for e in exts) else '')" 2>/dev/null || true); if [ "$HIT" = 1 ] && [ -f graphify-out/graph.json ]; then echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"MANDATORY: graphify-out/graph.json exists. You MUST run graphify before reading source files. Use: `graphify query \"<question>\"` (scoped subgraph), `graphify explain \"<concept>\"`, or `graphify path \"<A>\" \"<B>\"`. Only read raw files after graphify has oriented you, or to modify/debug specific lines. This rule applies to subagents too — include it in every subagent prompt involving code exploration."}}'; fi || true

FILE=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); t=d.get('tool_input',d); print(t.get('file_path',''))" 2>/dev/null || true); case "$FILE" in *.sql|*migration*|*schema*|*seed*) echo '{"hookSpecificOutput":{"hookEventName":"PreToolUse","additionalContext":"🗄️ SUPABASE: After any SQL change, verify with mcp__Supabase__execute_sql + mcp__Supabase__list_tables. RLS required on every user-exposed table. See connector-policy.md › Supabase › אבטחה."}}' ;; esac

F=$(python3 -c "import json,sys; d=json.load(sys.stdin); t=d.get('tool_input',d); print(t.get('file_path','') or '')" 2>/dev/null || true); EOS_LIB="${ENGINEERING_OS_HOME:-$(pwd)}/scripts/enforcement/lib/evidence.sh"; case "$F" in *core/pattern-lifecycle.md*) . "$EOS_LIB" 2>/dev/null && evidence_record read_pattern_lifecycle ;; *core/maintenance-routine.md*) . "$EOS_LIB" 2>/dev/null && evidence_record read_maintenance_routine ;; *core/hooks-policy.md*) . "$EOS_LIB" 2>/dev/null && evidence_record read_hooks_policy ;; esac 2>/dev/null || true

STAGED=$(git diff --cached --name-only 2>/dev/null); if [ -n "$STAGED" ]; then PLAN=$(ls -t .claude/plans/*.md 2>/dev/null | head -1); PMSG=""; [ -n "$PLAN" ] && PMSG="📋 spec_loop: plan '$(basename $PLAN)' exists — verify EVERY DoD item against output before committing. "; CODE=$(echo "$STAGED" | grep -cE '\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|py|go|rs)$' 2>/dev/null) || CODE=0; TEST=$(echo "$STAGED" | grep -cE '(\.(test|spec)\.(ts|tsx|js|jsx|py)|__tests__)' 2>/dev/null) || TEST=0; TWARN=""; [ "${CODE:-0}" -gt 0 ] && [ "${TEST:-0}" -eq 0 ] && TWARN="⚠️ ${CODE} code files staged, 0 test files in diff — pre-commit will scan project for tests. "; GMSG=""; [ "${CODE:-0}" -gt 0 ] && GMSG="📊 Run: graphify update . after commit to keep graph current. "; echo "{\"hookSpecificOutput\":{\"hookEventName\":\"Stop\",\"additionalContext\":\"${PMSG}${TWARN}${GMSG}Commit format: ✅❌🔄📌🧪 required (commit-msg hook enforces). superpowers:verification-before-completion must have run.\"}}"; fi || true
